description_long: This lamp features a broad, slightly curved square shade with a woven or textured fabric appearance, transitioning from a lighter top to a darker lower edge. The shade is supported by a single, thick cylindrical stem that connects to a wide, round base, providing stability. The base and stem are finished in a matte black or dark color, contrasting with the lighter shade. The lamp's design is minimalistic and modern, with clean lines and no visible switches or decorative embellishments. The overall proportions suggest it is intended for use as a floor lamp, suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The construction appears robust, with the shade likely diffusing light evenly across its surface.
description: A modern floor lamp with a wide, textured square shade and a sturdy black cylindrical base and stem. The lamp has a minimalist design with a light-to-dark gradient on the shade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the square shade and the round base directly beneath the stem.
description_view_1: Side view with the shade's texture and gradient visible, and the cylindrical stem and base aligned centrally.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the uniformity of the shade and the solid base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shade's gradient and the robust stem and base.
